title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Piramal Finance
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
